nasb.text: And he took them that very hour of the night and washed their wounds, and immediately he was baptized, he and all his household.

esv.text: And he took them the same hour of the night and washed their wounds; and he was baptized at once, he and all his family.

cnv.text: 就在當夜的那個時候，獄吏領他們去洗傷，獄吏和他家人都受了洗，

ccb.text: 当晚，狱卒把二人带去，为他们清洗伤口。他一家老小都接受了洗礼。

csbs.text: 当夜，就在那时刻，狱卒带他们去清洗伤口，然后他和所有的家人立刻受了洗。
